name: modport_typed_port_in_module
description: Code should include a module port declared with an interface modport type using dot syntax

name: mixed_normal_and_modport_ports
description: Code should include a module port list containing both normal signal ports and modport-typed ports

name: modport_port_without_direction_keyword
description: Code should include a modport-typed port that does not use input, output, or inout keywords

name: modport_port_without_wire_keyword
description: Code should include a modport-typed port that suppresses the wire keyword in its declaration

name: modport_with_direction_encoding
description: Code should include an interface modport definition that encodes signal directions internally
